home.title: Public identity resources for Neuroartan.
home.intro: Neuroartan Brand is the public identity resource for Neuroartan logos, visual foundations, digital usage, and public brand assets. This site provides a clear reference point for brand recognition, external discussion, and discoverable public identity material.

sections.title: Logo
sections.description: Primary logo references, symbol usage, identity marks, and logo presentation guidance.

sections.title: Fundamentals
sections.description: Core identity principles, brand purpose, public positioning, and visual foundation rules.

sections.title: Color & Typography
sections.description: Color system, typographic direction, contrast logic, and visual consistency rules.

sections.title: Digital
sections.description: Digital presentation guidance for websites, profiles, social platforms, and product surfaces.

sections.title: Public Assets
sections.description: Publicly available logo and identity assets for references, listings, and brand discovery.

presence.title: Brand presence
presence.description: Neuroartan is a cognitive systems company developing ICOS, a voice-trained cognitive operating system for memory, reflection, continuity, and structured intelligence. The brand identity supports a minimal, precise, and future-facing public presence for the company and its product ecosystem.

logo.title: Neuroartan logo system.
logo.intro: The Neuroartan logo system provides the primary public identity mark for company recognition, product association, and external brand references.

sections.title: Primary mark
sections.description: Use the primary Neuroartan mark for public brand references, official identity listings, and core company presentation.

sections.title: Symbol usage
sections.description: Use the symbol when space is limited or when the surrounding context already identifies Neuroartan.

sections.title: Clear presentation
sections.description: Keep the logo visually isolated, readable, and free from decorative distortion, excessive effects, or unrelated visual treatment.

fundamentals.title: Brand foundations.
fundamentals.intro: Neuroartan is positioned as a cognitive systems company focused on ICOS, governed intelligence, interface architecture, and profile-based continuity.

sections.title: Brand purpose
sections.description: Create a precise public identity for cognitive systems, continuity, memory, reflection, and structured intelligence.

sections.title: Public character
sections.description: The brand should remain minimal, intelligent, calm, future-facing, and technically credible.

sections.title: Communication rule
sections.description: Public language should describe Neuroartan as a new cognitive systems and product ecosystem without theatrical or exaggerated claims.

color-typography.title: Visual language system.
color-typography.intro: The visual system uses restrained contrast, quiet surfaces, precise typography, and token-governed spacing to support a professional public identity.

sections.title: Color
sections.description: Use a minimal neutral palette with controlled contrast and calm surface hierarchy.

sections.title: Typography
sections.description: Use Apple-native system typography where possible, with careful weight, spacing, and scale discipline.

sections.title: Token discipline
sections.description: Color, spacing, radius, typography, and surface values should be governed through shared tokens rather than local visual exceptions.

digital.title: Digital brand behavior.
digital.intro: Neuroartan digital surfaces should present the brand with clarity, minimal motion, strong readability, and source-owned visual assets.

sections.title: Website usage
sections.description: Use the brand identity consistently across public websites, product pages, documentation, and profile surfaces.

sections.title: Interface usage
sections.description: Digital layouts should be quiet, structured, responsive, and aligned with the broader Neuroartan interface system.

sections.title: Asset ownership
sections.description: Icons and identity assets should come from the synced public registry and should not be duplicated manually across repositories.

public-assets.title: Public brand assets.
public-assets.intro: This section will provide public-facing Neuroartan identity assets for reference, listings, discovery, and approved external use.

sections.title: Logo files
sections.description: Provide accessible logo references for public listings, press references, and brand discovery pages.

sections.title: Usage references
sections.description: Publish clear rules for correct public usage, visual spacing, and identity consistency.

sections.title: Discovery metadata
sections.description: Support search engines, brand directories, and external platforms with clean metadata and structured public identity information.
